stemHtml: The purpose of the performance database in the FMC is…

options.a: To record the performance of the aircraft over time and to adapt the flight routes accordingly.
options.b: To let the FMC know the optimum performance data for the aircraft in question.
options.c: To tell the FMC the required performance to be able to fly a certain route.
options.d: To keep track of the performance of the flight crew.
